creator: fuz@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Martin Filla from comment #6)

And once again, I cannot accept this patch as it hard-codes /usr/local.  If you must proceed this way, have your patch put in %%LOCALBASE%% and then use REINPLACE_CMD in pre-configure to substitute ${LOCALBASE} for %%LOCALBASE%%.

Implement that and then *test your patch.*
